'    '   ``-' `--' '--'   opc-tool by pro3d-space.

* validates OPC directories.
* generates KdTrees.

Examples: opc-tool --forcekdtreerebuild --generatedds --overwritedds --ignoremasterkdtree "K:\PRo3D Data\SAIIL_02_01-v3-opc\SAIIL_02_01"
result.stderr:
opc-tool 4.10.0.0+928b99b09299e20a2a88e00eac4539c601305bca
PRo3D.Space contributors

  --verbose                 Prints all messages to standard output.

  --forcekdtreerebuild      Forces rebuild and overwrites existing kd-trees

  --ignoremasterkdtree      Ignores master kd-trees and load or creates
                            per-patch kd-trees as well as the lazy kd-tree cache

  --generatedds             Generate DDS

  --skippatchvalidation     Skip patch validation (textures, aara files)

  --overwritedds            Overwrite DDS

  --degreesofparallelism    Degree of paralellism (0 for single threaded)

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.

  value pos. 0              Surface Directory
